'''zhoshavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:atangle|atangle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-sh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:atangle|atangle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhoshavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoshavithi|zhoshavithi]] || [[word:zhoshaviji|zhoshaviji]] || [[word:zhoshavishi|zhoshavishi]] || [[word:zhoshaviki|zhoshaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoshavuthuthu|zhoshavuthuthu]] || [[word:zhoshavujuju|zhoshavujuju]] || [[word:zhoshavushushu|zhoshavushushu]] || [[word:zhoshavukuku|zhoshavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoshavuthu|zhoshavuthu]] || [[word:zhoshavuju|zhoshavuju]] || [[word:zhoshavushu|zhoshavushu]] || [[word:zhoshavuku|zhoshavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoshavufthuf|zhoshavufthuf]] || [[word:zhoshavufjuf|zhoshavufjuf]] || [[word:zhoshavufshuf|zhoshavufshuf]] || [[word:zhoshavufkuf|zhoshavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoshavethe|zhoshavethe]] || [[word:zhoshaveje|zhoshaveje]] || [[word:zhoshaveshe|zhoshaveshe]] || [[word:zhoshaveke|zhoshaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoshavothotho|zhoshavothotho]] || [[word:zhoshavojojo|zhoshavojojo]] || [[word:zhoshavoshosho|zhoshavoshosho]] || [[word:zhoshavokoko|zhoshavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoshavotho|zhoshavotho]] || [[word:zhoshavojo|zhoshavojo]] || [[word:zhoshavosho|zhoshavosho]] || [[word:zhoshavoko|zhoshavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoshavofthof|zhoshavofthof]] || [[word:zhoshavofjof|zhoshavofjof]] || [[word:zhoshavofshof|zhoshavofshof]] || [[word:zhoshavofkof|zhoshavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoshavĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoshavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshavĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoshavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshavĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoshavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshavĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoshavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoshavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoshavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoshavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoshavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoshavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoshavĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoshavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshavĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoshavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshavĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoshavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshavĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoshavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoshavĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoshavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshavĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoshavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshavĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoshavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshavĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoshavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoshavĂŠthĂŠ|zhoshavĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhoshavĂŠjĂŠ|zhoshavĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhoshavĂŠshĂŠ|zhoshavĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhoshavĂŠkĂŠ|zhoshavĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoshavathatha|zhoshavathatha]] || [[word:zhoshavajaja|zhoshavajaja]] || [[word:zhoshavashasha|zhoshavashasha]] || [[word:zhoshavakaka|zhoshavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoshavatha|zhoshavatha]] || [[word:zhoshavaja|zhoshavaja]] || [[word:zhoshavasha|zhoshavasha]] || [[word:zhoshavaka|zhoshavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoshavafthaf|zhoshavafthaf]] || [[word:zhoshavafjaf|zhoshavafjaf]] || [[word:zhoshavafshaf|zhoshavafshaf]] || [[word:zhoshavafkaf|zhoshavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhoshavasha|zhoshavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhoshavshĂ«asha|zhoshavshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhoshavroasha|zhoshavroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhoshavmuasha|zhoshavmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhoshavyaasha|zhoshavyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhoshavnkshĂ«asha|gozhoshavnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhoshavnkroasha|gozhoshavnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhoshavnkmuasha|gozhoshavnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhoshavnkyaasha|gozhoshavnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhoshashavasha|zhoshashavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhoshashavshĂ«asha|zhoshashavshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhoshashavroasha|zhoshashavroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhoshashavmuasha|zhoshashavmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhoshashavyaasha|zhoshashavyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhoshashavnkshĂ«asha|gozhoshashavnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhoshashavnkroasha|gozhoshashavnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhoshashavnkmuasha|gozhoshashavnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhoshashavnkyaasha|gozhoshashavnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zheshĂŠvasha|zheshĂŠvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zheshĂŠvshĂ«asha|zheshĂŠvshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zheshĂŠvroasha|zheshĂŠvroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zheshĂŠvmuasha|zheshĂŠvmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zheshĂŠvyaasha|zheshĂŠvyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozheshĂŠvnkshĂ«asha|gozheshĂŠvnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozheshĂŠvnkroasha|gozheshĂŠvnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozheshĂŠvnkmuasha|gozheshĂŠvnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozheshĂŠvnkyaasha|gozheshĂŠvnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhoshfavasha|zhoshfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhoshfavshĂ«asha|zhoshfavshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhoshfavroasha|zhoshfavroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhoshfavmuasha|zhoshfavmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhoshfavyaasha|zhoshfavyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhoshfavnkshĂ«asha|gozhoshfavnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhoshfavnkroasha|gozhoshfavnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhoshfavnkmuasha|gozhoshfavnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhoshfavnkyaasha|gozhoshfavnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
